name: GridEditingApi
description: The editing API interface that is available in the grid `apiRef`.

properties.name: getCellMode
properties.description: Gets the mode of a cell.

properties.name: getRowMode
properties.description: Gets the mode of a row.

properties.name: getRowWithUpdatedValues
properties.description:
Returns the row with the values that were set by editing the cells.
In row editing, `field` is ignored and all fields are considered.

properties.name: isCellEditable
properties.description: Controls if a cell is editable.

properties.name: setEditCellValue
properties.description:
Sets the value of the edit cell.
Commonly used inside the edit cell component.
properties.type: (params: { id: string | number, field: string, value: any, debounceMs?: number, unstable_skipValueParser?: boolean }, event?: {} | SyntheticEvent<HTMLElement, Event> | ErrorEvent | Event | UIEvent | AnimationEvent | PointerEvent | MouseEvent | InputEvent | ToggleEvent | FocusEvent | CompositionEvent | ClipboardEvent | DragEvent | FormDataEvent | KeyboardEvent | ProgressEvent<EventTarget> | SecurityPolicyViolationEvent | SubmitEvent | TouchEvent | TransitionEvent | WheelEvent) => void | Promise<boolean>

properties.name: startCellEditMode
properties.description: Puts the cell corresponding to the given row id and field into edit mode.
properties.type: (params: { id: string | number, field: string, deleteValue?: boolean, initialValue?: any }) => void

properties.name: startRowEditMode
properties.description: Puts the row corresponding to the given id into edit mode.
properties.type: (params: { id: string | number, fieldToFocus?: string, deleteValue?: boolean, initialValue?: string }) => void

properties.name: stopCellEditMode
properties.description:
Puts the cell corresponding to the given row id and field into view mode and updates the original row with the new value stored.
If `params.ignoreModifications` is `true` it will discard the modifications made.
properties.type: (params: { id: string | number, field: string, ignoreModifications?: boolean, cellToFocusAfter?: "none" | "left" | "right" | "below" }) => void

properties.name: stopRowEditMode
properties.description:
Puts the row corresponding to the given id and into view mode and updates the original row with the new values stored.
If `params.ignoreModifications` is `true` it will discard the modifications made.
properties.type: (params: { id: string | number, ignoreModifications?: boolean, field?: string, cellToFocusAfter?: "none" | "left" | "right" | "below" }) => void
